channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: BAT bros I don't feel so good — 58 replies — 64.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
BAT bros I don't feel so good

Open thread • Replies: 58 • Updated: 2026-03-08 03:31 UTC

OP

Eich scammed us I just hope we get back to 20c so I can dump this shit

Early replies (first 3)

61942645
Nigga you have to wait a full fucking year. It dumps consistently in December-January, so buy now and dump then.

The eich nigger will never ever employ actual use cases for this token because he and his team are scared little faggots.

The president and his entire family have publicly rug pulled multiple times and nothing has come of it negatively for them. Brendan eich is just a scared little faggot do nothing bitch boy.

61942696
>>61942058
>>61942645
I solded after I saw Eich namedropped in the epstein files.

61942728
>>61942058
Who would've thought 27 cents would be the local top for BAT

the highs get lower

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947959
>>61946916
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
YOUR CONTENT IS AMAZING

61947966
>>61947892
it depends on what that thing is. in this case, i wouldnt say its necessarily too late. i guess we'll see.

61948112
>>61947892
Moar please

61948155
>>61946916
>the perfect ass does not exist

61948157
>>61947966
What can you tell us?

61948171
>>61947892
>Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT

Doesn't feel very based but I'm glad there are at least a few of us suffering together

also, requesting my threadly dose of big booty latinas and/or brown girls

61948211
>>61948157
Heres a clue without giving it away completely. What did RH just announce?

61948488
>>61947892
>>61947742
Based thanks very much as always TP. Keep up the good work.

61948551
>tfw thotposter leaves the thread

pack it in, show's over. See you all next week

61948607
>>6194789
Lost
>>61948551
Tp has been super active lately, xhe will post later today most likely

61948610
>>61947892
Lost

61948617
>>61948607
>xhe will post later today most likely

Ok, but I want more thots right now.

61948640
>>61948617
Good point. tp was posting some gold earlier.

61948750
>>61947107
God damn. Didn’t think anyone that far back would still be around.

61948758
>>61947107
Forgot about this image lol

61949100
>>61948211
Robinhood Social?

61949163
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please continue

61949509
>>61949100
No. Come on lol.

61949527
>>61949509
A credit card

61949557
>>61949527
close enough

61949568
>>61949557
Why would a Brave card matter. Nobody would ever want one

61949576
>>61946916
>>61947061
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please just dump webms on cooldown just one time 50 straight posts minimum

61949586
>>61949568
take a deep breath. youre a big boy, you can figure it out from here.

61949620
>>61949586
Passively earning BAT via purchases with the card or something?

61949679
>>61949620
yea, there are a few options here, which are non-mutually exclusive

61949758
>>61949679
Not sure if that is going to move the needle but maybe its bigger than what I picture in my head.

61949813
>>61949758
i mean what do you have pictured in terms of dollar amounts

61950201
>>61948171
>requesting my threadly dose of big booty latinas and/or brown girls
I got you anytime, lad. Will post more for you in a bit.

>>61948488
I appreciate it, lad!

>>61947959
Much appreciated ^_^

>>61949576
Sounds fun actually, I'm down!

61950575
>>61950201
Incredible, thank you based TP

61950596
>>61950201
I have zero idea how I would even penetrate that

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-03-08 03:34 UTC

OP

61933306

61935537

61936241

up

61938023

61938297

61938461
ok

61938624

stop. the jannies have encountered this trolling before and have a lazy approach to it, date based auto-sages. But it kills long running threads that are quality. you + their lazys asses WILL kill the board.

>>61938624

lets do it

61939451
>>61938624

61939566

>But it kills long running threads that are quality

There are no quality threads on biz you retard.
There are only retarded spam threads like "500k is life changing money" or "OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO" cope threads.
So we might as well have fun with these spam snail threads.

61941094

61941500
SNAILS IS LOVE SNAIL IS LIFE

61942081
upp

61943177
ssnail

61943550
>>61943518

61943559
>>61943518

61945550
snailola where ya go ta?

61945962

61945991

61948615

61948783
>>61943559

61950255
>>61948615
Snailshitting

61950462
>>61950255
Jew

61950553
>>61933100
While we wait for BTC to 1M, I'm trying so hard to get 1BTC and stake on babylon, its going to be a generational wealth for me.

61950609
>>61950553

item.title: How high will OIL go? — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
How high will OIL go?

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-03-08 04:23 UTC

OP

150?
200?

Early replies (first 3)

61950050
>>61949961
The Trump admin probably starts trying to implement price controls above $150.

61950059
>>61949961
10,000 Gold.

61950077
How will crypto perform without rate cuts in the next 3 years?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950083
>>61950059
Eoy yes

61950184
>>61949961
That's Tehran right? So all those oil tanks were holding the oil that Iran was using to pay for those non-working radars and anti-ship missiles. Winnie the Pooh won't be happy about that.

61950223
I knew I should have bought an oil container when it was like 2.50 a gallon a little while ago but I had no idea how that would even work

61950468
>>61949961
The only thing keeping oil high is insurance companies. When they start insuring again oil will be flowing through the Strait again and oil will hit its top next week.

61950713
>>61949961
Alright, let's look at where this might go...

1973 Oil Crisis:

In March 1974, OAPEC lifted the embargo, but the price of oil had risen by nearly 300%: from US$3 per barrel to nearly US$12 per barrel globally. Prices in the United States were significantly higher than the global average.

- $3 -> $12 = 400% increase

- In today's dollars: $22.91 -> $83.76, 365.6% increase (which coincidentally also shows how retarded the way the gov calculates inflation is)

1979 Oil Crisis:

In January 1979, the U.S. crude oil first purchase price was approximately $9.46 per barrel. "Starting with the Iranian revolution, the price of crude oil rose to $39.50 per barrel over the next 12 months (its all-time highest real price until March 3, 2008)."

- $9.46 -> $39.50 = 417.5% increase

- In today's dollars: $45.05 -> $157.06, 348.6% increase

Oil's lowest price per barrel over the past year was $56.52, occurring on Dec 19th, 2025. If we multiply that by 400% we get a potential $226.08/barrel.

The price per barrel three weeks ago before it was completely obvious that the US was committed to attacking Iran was $60.71/barrel. 400% × $60.71 = $242.84/barrel.

61950718
>>61950184
The chinese tech from 2004? Imagine using that
>>61949961
They sell like 85% of that oil to middlemen who then sell the oil to China so not a big deal

item.title: Is moving away from gold as a store of value inevitable? — 6 replies — 24.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is moving away from gold as a store of value inevitable?

Open thread • Replies: 6 • Updated: 2026-03-08 04:24 UTC

OP

If human technology advances exponentially it wont be long until it is so sophisticated acquiring any type of mineral in large quantities will be trivial. As much as bitcoin gets ragged on with quantum fud atleast there are already contingencies being drawn up to make btc wallets quantum resistant, no such contingences can ever be made for gold or silver. We can already identify asteroids with 10 quintillion dollars worth of gold, what happens when it starts being mined?

PM holders will say the most valuable use case for gold or silver is in the event of total societal collapse, currency debasement and a permanent shut down of the internet. But how much will gold even matter in a world like that? Guns, ammunition and food will ultimately become the most desirable commodities (maybe even just guns and ammo). Your gold will be worthless if you are missing one of the aforementioned three. So until then shouldn't I just stockpile bitcoin, guns, ammo and preserved food?

Early replies (first 3)

61950205
>>61950195
buttcoin is not gonna replace gold, retard

61950211
>>61950195
are you familiar with the idea of post-scarcity?

what's actually going to happen is you're going to exist in a simulation, as part of that simulation. You won't have a body so you won't have any access to physical gold. All the gold in your world will be simulated, and they can simulate infinite gold if they want.

61950544
>>61950205

Could be sooner, could be later, but will, eventually.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950586
>>61950544
>dude, literal nothing is gonna replace a metal created by stars that humans have valued for thousands of years
literally kys. it would do humanity a favor. we can't afford stupidity like this infecting the young generation

61950669
>> muh asteroids.

61950715
>>61950586

If you understood how gold works as money, you'd know that it's true. You don't understand gold.

item.title: WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS — 27 replies — 18.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS

OP

WHATEVER YOU DO, DON'T STOP SHORTING OIL AND GAS

Early replies (first 3)

61949419
>>61949388
You retard, that means the price of oil is gonna go…. You know what. Go ahead anon. You’re right. I hope you do short oil and gas

61949422
>>61949388
We are still early

61949435
>>61949388
Just bought oil

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949437
>>61949388
TACO

61949438
>>61949388
Oil is being destroyed and the supply is dropping. It's so over. Opening my shorts.

61949440
>>61949388
>shorting a reverse falling knife

61949441
>>61949435
Olive oil? Canola oil?
You cant buy oil on Saturday

61949442
>>61949388
global warming bros? is this bullish for temperatures?

61949447
The brics, banks and billionaires have been loading up on gold the last 10/15 years, this is why.

61949448
Stack physical oil

61949452
>>61949442
>>/r/eddit

61949468
>>61949441
Heard of eToro, fool!

61949479
>>61949468

61949484
Imma gonna short firefighting equipment, the market oversaturated with combustion.

61949489
>>61949388
I don't believe the hype. It's not 2001 anymore, the Middle East is not the de-facto world supplier of oil. Nowadays there are countless exporters of oil on the field. That's what I see, that's where my money is.
There will surely be real consequences for this debacle. It will not be the oil catastrophe it's being hyped up to be.

61949504
>>61949448
not your barrels not your oil

61949511
>>61949388
Did you short oil thinking Trump was going to TACO? Is that why you need us to join your retarded trade so that we can light our money on fire alongside you?

61949515
>>61949489
it's a global market. also isn't not as simple as oil = oil. there are different grades or types of oil. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_crude_oil_products refineries are built to process certain grades of oil. you can't easily re-tool a refinery to process other grades, it's a massive undertaking that costs a lot of money.

61949516
I put several grand into oil futures yesterday. Keep bombing all Persian Gulf production facilities pls.

61949589
>>61949440
ANTI-GRAVITATIONAL KNIFE

61949595
>>61949489
Gulf is 20% of world supply
Demand is highly inelastic

61949675
>>61949419
>Hello Europe, the price of oil has risen
>Hello Middle East, we definitely want the same amount of oil since we clearly have absurd amounts of money and aren't struggling at all

61949825
Trump will set pump prices. No more increases. Prices will fall soon.

61949895
This but unironically, the puts are dirt cheap, the otherside of the trade is filled with retards. It just takes one tweet

61949935
>>61949825
I think they will try this. Bessent said they’re going to announce measures Thursday that’ll possibly include shorting the futures.

61950453
OIL BROS, WHAT KIND OF BARRELS DO I BUY?!?!

61950522
>>61949895
This. Otm puts on everything was and somehow still is a bargain

item.title: I put roughly $400k on USO puts at strike price $90 expiring march 27th. — 5 replies — 18.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
I put roughly $400k on USO puts at strike price $90 expiring march 27th.

Open thread • Replies: 5 • Updated: 2026-03-08 04:08 UTC

OP

I put roughly $400k on USO puts at strike price $90 expiring march 27th.

I did xanax and blacked out and placed the trades and fell asleep. it's my entire account and my net liquidity is like $13k or something.

so hopefully oil go down a lil bit or else im gonna have a heart attack on monday. i havent eaten and I still have no appetite. i cant even post pictures of the positions (im already down a bit on them)

I wish I was kidding, I cant feel my face and I start screaming every now and then. I already had the police called on me because the neighbors got worried and I explained it to the cops and they just went quiet and wished me luck.

I tried calling the exchange but there was nothing they could do.

Early replies (first 3)

61950275
Are you retarded? Rhetorical question. Sell them at open and take the idiot tax

61950614
>I explained it to the cops and they just went quiet and wished me luck

Cops don’t know what options are.

61950653
>>61950166
This is a larp until you post postions

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950671
its gongo up

61950686
>>61950166
I have USO $150 puts expiring 12/18. But I only put $1700 lol. Starting to think it's a bad idea, oil fields are on fire so oil might pop off on Monday. Might be a good time to buy puts on Monday though, can't imagine any news being worst than oil fields on fire in Iran

Also wtf is up with the captcha. They are hard

The only altcoin you should hold longterm.

OP

The only altcoin you should hold longterm.

>Market Crash
>Leverage addicts keep trading
>buybacks
>Pumps or at least doesn't dump

It's the anti-chainlink. And they've added OIL for all the addicts out there.

Early replies (first 3)

61947579
>>61947563

How many more of these do we have to endure in the next 2 years?
> eth killer
and all that

61947595
TOKEN NOT SNEEDED i trade on it though

61947897
>>61947563
copy cat of GNS but worse (even though its 100x the mc)
ill hold my low market cap GNS to the moon (or zero) before i buy your jump trading jeet scam coin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61948332
>>61947595
Don’t they do aggressive buy backs so token has a floor always?

61948338
>>61947897
Hanh? By that logic Gns is copycat SNX. Onchain markets have always been a thing

61948653
>>61947595
HYPE is used as gas for the hyperliquid blockchain

>>61948332
They're pretty aggresive. It bounced once it touched $20 and it's been at the $30 range for a month. A lot of volume on commodities and that means fees and that means buybacks.

Why do you think CZ was so afraid that shilled that crap called ASTER?

61950574
>>61947897
>jump trading jeet scam
"Jump Trading is not a known investor or partner of Hyperliquid based on available public information."
What? Why do you think Jump Trading is involved?
Instant sell if they are of course

item.title: >biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to… — 71 replies — 66.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
>biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to…

Open thread • Replies: 71 • Updated: 2026-03-08 03:21 UTC

OP

>biggest oil shock since 1973
>literally the worst case economic scenario
>he STILL hasn't sold
Some people just want to lose money.

Early replies (first 3)

61942069
Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
they don't want to anger china and Europe

61942088
last time I checked bitcoin is mostly mined with clean coal and waterfall generators so tell me why it matters

61942092
May panic sell tomorrow. Already got fucked holding over one weekend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61943436
>what is covid
Oil went bonkers like a dozen times since 2020, we had literally negative crud but muh 1973

61943514
>>61942065
It is moving quicker than I thought. I sold everything yesterday. Even my oil stocks, might miss out on the upside, but I have a suspicion that if there is a crash it is going to affect everything.

61943602
>>61942069
Trust the plan
Patriots are in control!

61943631
>>61943436
>what was covid
A perfect time to buy? So by that analogy now should be a perfect time to sell because oil is going in the opposite direction

61943663
I want to short. I really want. But this stupid ass market is completely delusional and gulping Trump's tweets like good sperm.
We had yet another illustration of this just two days ago when muh insurance mechanism, strait is open, navy will proteec ur ass, trust us, and thus oil started to dump.
Which obviously was a load of fucking bullshit as tankers got hit in the meantime.
And now the narrative being pushed is Shitran's ballistic missiles launch is going down exponentially. Well, sure, but they sure as fuck didn't hit tankers with fucking ballistic missiles.
One drone. One. One a day hitting a tanker.
That's all it takes to make the strait permanently closed.

But the fucktarded market being the fucktarded ape it is, it can't see that. no, it will trust any lie from the administration to pump it.
How is anyone supposed to short in these conditions, and how much can you fuck up with price discovery before it becomes a complete catastrophe spiling out of control.
I fucking hate these retards. Everyone in this dumb market, everyone in this fucktarded administration, and basically, every fucking one.

61943678
>>61942281
>exports mostly to china
>china needs oil
>china buys oil from other suppliers
>china slurps (You)r oil btw
>it's allowed because the west needs their temu shit
>oil price skyrockets globally

61943692
>>61943663
KWAB

61946145
>>61942558
>Reducing the supply of oil increases the price, since the demand will remain the same or increase.
No, the demand will not stay the same if the ones who demand it require it to keep demanding it in the first place. If the oil-importing economies can not sustain the expense of importation their economies will be less productive and have less money to import oil. If you had a population and during a drought you'd let some of them starve the demand for food during and after the drought would not stay the same as some people died and the other ones won't just start eating more simply because they survived.

>>61942752
>They did for some countries.
Most I heard was two tankers. I wouldn't call that a reopening of the strait.

61946502
>>61942069
I heard 2 more weeks from my sources

61946529
Last year around this time everybody was screaming about tarrifs ending the economy and wow would you look at that NOTHING HAPPENED

61946548
>>61942065
>biggest oil shock since 1973
Is it? I'm not in the US and prices here are normal only stocks went a little up, but they have being going up for quite some time.

61946711
>>61942069
>Europe
lol

61946723
>>61942065
Silver spikes after oil shocks.

61947257
>>61942178
Shit nigga, 6 years? But /this time could be different/ if iran is ripped and the straight is opened

61947267
I won't sell because I have nothing to sell. I am dog shit stupid and I don't know anything about stocks or jewels or crypto I just come here for funsies

61947378
>>61942069
Its already open for china you fucking idiot

61947387
>>61942281
Your logic would be correct, however, Jews.

61947442
>>61942069
Modern Europe is a neutered whimpering dog. "Angering" them is a null point.

61947483
>>61943678
>Implying China will be getting even one (1) drop of oil from the world market after they're blockaded (Which is next after Iran)

Anon, the world will bend down and kiss America's boot and like it. Nobody will be able to force ships through the trade lanes the moment we just start sinking anything with a foreign flag that has not been cleared by the DoD.

61948690
>>61947483
Good luck blocking russia from supplying china with oil migatard

61948691
>>61947483
Whose we?

61948692
>>61942069
probably true desu
I think they just said they won't be targeting "other countries" already.

61948696
>>61942092
Don't do it. Never do it. Just top up if it plummets

61948701
im panic fucking selling on monday, what the fuck was I even thinking

61948708
>>61942065
Thanks jews.

61950358
>>61942065

Remember that time Sleepy Joe depleted the strategic oil reserve to keep oil prices down when he sanctioned Russia for going into Ukraine?

61950537
>>61942065
but oil opts are literally throwing money at me. although now with trump talking about the war being won its probably time to short

61950542
>>61942121
but they can't agree on anything because they were retarded and let putins puppets like hungary join as they were on a expansion spree. none of the soviet shitholes should have been let in

61950552
>>61942281
but how much of that goes into making plastic trinkets for the western consoomer

61950566
So…what am I buying on Monday

item.title: Is this guy actually right about BTC? — 24 replies — 44.4/hr

Open thread • Replies: 24 • Updated: 2026-03-08 03:52 UTC

To the moon 2028 onwards!

>>61946976

The questions is when.

61947079
>>61946976

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

>>61947018

61947155
>>61946976
no, not until 2028

61947315
>>61946976

61947355
>>61946976
nope hes a LUNA 2.0 in the making

61948169
>>61947070

61948525
>>61946976
Nobody knows what btc will do. im just staking mine on babylon. self custody is key anon.

61948527
>>61946976
>is the egg man right about the eggs?

61948565
You might as well YOLO it all on crypto. Everything else is aids right now.

61948571
>>61948169
In the end Btc is an asset that doesnt produce anything and all the shit he has constructed relies on Btc going higher in price forever.
Everybody with 2 brain cells knows that Btc is not going to last forever at these prices. The chain will still exist but it will much less important and the ones that actually are used for something useful and produce a revenue will grow and prevail.

61950193
>>61948525
same. Just waiting for TBV launch. More btc utility would be nice.

61950245
>>61946976
when priced in fiat currency scarce desirable assets go up in value forever.

61950249
>>61947155
Let's wait then

61950301
>>61948527
He's the eggman so yeah lol

61950306
>>61946976
Lol

61950450
>>61950193
What's that anon?

61950454
>>61950306
Crypto remains the best no matter what you say nigger

61950455
>>61950306
>WW3 starts
>shiny rocks do nothing
You rockfags are LIARS

61950561
>>61947018
Anytime bull run starts, I'm good. only those that arent staking BTC might panic

61950612
>>61950450
DYOR anon. Clue: BTC stays on Bitcoin while being productive as collateral. Proofs are on-chain, trustless, no gatekeepers.

61950637
>>61948565
And what are your plans?

61950652
>>61946976
The thesis for BTC never plays out in reality, it's not a hedge against inflation, it's not a hedge against currency debasement, it's not a hedge against risk, it's a speculative asset that requires more people to buy in at a higher price for it to go up, the only real world use case for it is money laundering

Open thread • Replies: 83 • Updated: 2026-03-08 01:45 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

61942258
????? It means we bomb the shit out of them wdym

61942268
>>61942181
I hate being American over the last decade so much, all we do is lose and embarrass ourselves... how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources? Meanwhile China will do nothing and win again and I will gave to endure all of 4chan laughing at us... I want to support China but I can't into Chinese women. Europe needs to become a superpower and dethrone China and America so I can cheer them on without reservations.

61942402
>>61942268

61945631

61945648
>>61945575

Fucking kek. This is the same retard who claims that Hannibal Barca didn't exist. He just hates Western Culture and White people and wants to re-write Western history.

If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink). It's not hard to tell where the resentment comes from. Very common amongst asians btw.

You're either a paid shill, brown, asian, or very very fucking stupid to be pushing this astroturfed angry chink.

61946117
>>61942572

61946193

61946198
>>61945631

I almost feel bad for the normies that get sucked into the propaganda stream. The world is much easier to read, ironically without the "news" telling you what is going on (what to think)

61946252
>>61945575

61946276
>>61945575
Zionism is simply one head of the luciferian snake. There are many, and many are highly prominent in the world.
Don't confuse it with christianity just because they hide their disdain for the Creator most of the time

61946337
>>61946276

61946383
>>61942478
>They killed the leader, they rejects diplomatic offers which eliminated the possibility of iran creating a nuclear arsenal.
retard take, who the fuck told you that horseshit? and why are you dumb enough to believe them?

>>61942513
literally the only good thing about Iran is that they resisted the centraI banking carteI kikes tyranny, everything else about the government is awful, i want to call Iran Persia again, like the Iranian expats i occassionally speak to at my job who insist they're Persian, no Iranian.

61946430
>>61945648
>If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink).

i know a LOT of asians, some literally do get bullied for being gooks, usually by non-whites, but still, it scars them. Often them simply having a white friend, which is all some of them ever want, is enough to cure that entirely however.

>>61945242
its impossible for it to be worse than afghanistan, you either didn't live through it because you're a zoomer who failed school, or you're a retarded, lying shill.

>>61944680
so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free? thats even more pathetic anon, assuming you aren't lying. You're definitely turd-skinned though.

>>61943623
JlDF arriving quickly it seems, why arent you fighting on the frontlines Vile Schlomo? go on, your people want their greater lsraeI? go work for it.

>>61943610
its a real shame that all this anti-semitism that's popped up has once again completely missed this point huh?
>hurr jooz bad
>whats a central bank? i dunno
fucking npcs will never wake up.

61948084
>>61946430
>so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free?
I am white but I am a poorfag loser it's true. Not trying to astroturf anything, that's genuinely how I feel about it.

61948208
>>61943069
there are american ones too but their job isnt to shill, its to create conflict between us poors so that we dont eat the rich. all the tranny posting is by them.

61948661
>>61942181
Around 2011 Stefan Molyneux, libertarians and the tea party were saying the US Government was in $14 trillion of debt and there is no way the forever wars can continue. Look at us now.

https://odysee.com/@freedomain:b/another-imperial-quagmire-dr-ivan-eland:c

61948695
>>61943665
What an inane schizo rant. There is not a single indication for this to be true.

61948804
>>61942181
I voted for this

61948817
>>61943056
Germany declared war on the USA and not the other way around

61948937
>>61943665
>theories jewish psychologists invented, and retarded pseuds peddle to try and poison the well of Hitler-sentiment to keep the goys from waking up.
JlDF trannies are like broken records i swear, did they just replace you freaks with AI or something? hard to tell.

>>61948817
on paper they did, because the USA baited Japan, their ally, into attacking them, by blockading their cargo ships so they couldn't source crude oil. I could personally declare war against the USA right now from new zealand, but its as meaningless as when HitIer did.

>>61948661
alot of geopolitical and finance bros outside the normie sphere thought the same thing, but we were all blinded by one problem, every single US president and all the top officials were all controlled ped0s and puppets for globohomo. and on top of that, they were all retarded too.

But nobody realised HOW retarded and corrupt, because a relatively normal man with a good head for old-school economics, stepped in and simply copied what has worked in the past for the USA, and in his personal life. Its not a scenario that anyone could have predicted.

Trump is potentially solving the national debt by taxing the rest of the planet to do it. It'll probably work too, for awhile, until the rest of us go broke because of it. The central banking carteI designed this system to fail, not work for everyone.

61949034
used to browse 4chan all the time. old /pol/ etc yada who cares. fuck me this place looks dated. even if 99% of people here were working for some government agency or another - it's still just a rss feed for twitter which stopped mattering 8 years ago. who the fuck even bothers shilling on 4chan in 2028-2?

61949083
>>61943623
You are the midwit that believed your history teacher when he divided the class between non blond and blued eyed people vs everyone else and told that Hitler would kill everyone on the non blond/blue eyed side

61949561
>>61942633
Trump is a lot smarter than people give him credit for, and that is bad thing..
Don't get me wrong, i don't think there is any plan, most of it just seems to be throwing spaghetti at the wall and see what sticks.
..and "what sticks" - a desired outcome, seems to be either money (for him), elite loyalty, and/or creating prestige around his persona.
I think the war in Iran is about elite loyalty - money and prestige could certainly arise as an opportunity to be taken, but the main reason the US is at war with Iran is to cater to pro-Israel elite in the US.

61949755
if Steiner attacks, everything will be alright.

61950271
>>61942478
>>61942920
Israel wants regime change.
Trump wanted to accomplish that with the same tactics as Venezuela.
Venezuela was a not a regime change per se but was a capitulation that could result in peaceful regime change if the US enforces fair elections.
So they were trying to do something similar, "it's just that easy, kidnap/kill the leader!"
The problem is that the devil is in the details. Maduro was genuinely broadly unpopular, with uprising blocked by Cartels with a profit motive and Cuban Communist ideology. The Cartels fold if they smell profit and the Cuban control was naturally very weak and not sustainable.
Meanwhile the Iranian opposition is not broadly popular, neither is restoring the Shah, and Islamic ideology is not weak.
The protests were not an Arab Spring.
So creating a martyr of the Ayatollah obviously didn't work.
So the leaders are gone, but the regime is still intact, and there is no plan. Just like Iraq, boots on the ground are required for regime change, and Trump would instead prefer to end this quickly and open up the Strait of Hormuz.
Boots on the ground is insanely unpopular, and protracted conflict means oil-induced recession, and Iran would be foolish to agree to any ceasefire.

61950276
Iran will fall and within a year of that, America will fall too. This entire war is engineered to leave Israel as the top dog in the middle east that doesn't have to answer to anyone.

61950277
>>61942181
US govt is nothing more than an international criminal terrorist mafia
And the US military are carrying out acts of terrorism and genocide on behalf of ziocons

61950288
>>61950271
>Regime
Iran has a legitimate government.
The genocidal terrorist states of us and Israel are ruled by criminal mafia 'regimes'
